name: AnalysisObjectSelector
summary: Get or set selected analysis objects in model views.

constructors.name: AnalysisObjectSelector
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisObjectSelector class.

methods.name: GetSelectedObjects
methods.summary: Get the analysis objects selected in model views.

returns.doc: The analysis object enumerator of analysis objects selected in model views.

methods.name: SetSelectedObjects
methods.signature: public int SetSelectedObjects(List<AnalysisObject> analysisObjects, bool append)
methods.summary: Set analysis objects as selected in model views.

params.name: append
params.doc: If true, objects are added to currently selected. If false, current selection is cleared.
